name: Audit & Brief
intent: inspect the subject, then turn the findings into a plain-language brief with a verdict

steps.instruction: Examine the subject named in the rig intent. List concrete findings — what it is, what it does, anything risky or notable — as terse bullet points.
Turn the previous step's findings into a short plain-language brief (3-5 sentences) a non-expert can act on, ending with a one-line verdict.
